testcase.name: YYC³ Easy Table Converter - Core User Flows › homepage should load correctly
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › core-flows.spec.ts:8:7 › YYC³ Easy Table Converter - Core User Flows › homepage should load correctly
Error: expect(page).toHaveTitle(expected) failed
Expected pattern: /YYC³ Easy Table Converter/ Received string: "Grafana" Timeout: 5000ms
Call log: - Expect "toHaveTitle" with timeout 5000ms 13 × unexpected value "Grafana"
7 | 8 | test('homepage should load correctly', async ({ page }) => { > 9 | await expect(page).toHaveTitle(/YYC³ Easy Table Converter/); | ^ 10 | 11 | const header = page.locator('header'); 12 | await expect(header).toBeVisible(); at /Users/my/Desktop/YYC³ Easy Table Converter/e2e/core-flows.spec.ts:9:24
